name: Sunspire Haven
seasonal_change: harvest windows, drought pressure, and convoy timing shape local rhythm more than abstract festival calendars.
seasonal_effects: harvest windows, drought pressure, and convoy timing shape local rhythm more than abstract festival calendars.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
